function G(G)return R[G-(1019074-998673)]end do local G=table.insert local z=string.sub local J=string.len local N=math.floor local s=R local w=table.concat local u=type local n=string.char local return(function(R,J,N,s,w,u,n,z,M,L,Q,h,C,i,p,l,c,S,O,F,E,V,X)Q,z,h,M,l,X,C,O,p,i,c,F,E,S,L,V=function(R,G)local J=h(G)local N=function(N,s,w,u)return z(R,{N;s,w,u},G,J)end return N end,function(z,N,s,w)local b,Y,U,d,q,M,E,k,c,JP,y,j,V,NP,I,sP,a,g,P,GP,zP,e,RP,D,r,Z,m,W,v,H,t,T,x,A,K,B,f,h,n,o,wP while z do if z<6405899-(-989259)then if z<2888456-(-448910)then if
